# Claude Platform Provider

Manage Anthropic Claude platform organization resources via the Admin API: workspaces, members, invites, API keys, service accounts, and Workload Identity Federation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    claudeplatform = {
      source = "rileydakota/claude-platform"
    }
  }
}

# Option 1: org:admin OAuth token (full surface, including WIF resources).
#   ant auth login --profile admin --scope "org:admin"
#   export ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_TOKEN=$(ant auth print-credentials --profile admin --access-token)
provider "claudeplatform" {}

# Option 2: admin API key (env ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY). Classic Admin API only —
# service accounts and federation issuers/rules will error, since those
# endpoints reject admin API keys.
# provider "claudeplatform" {
#   admin_api_key = var.admin_api_key
# }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `admin_api_key` (String, Sensitive) Admin API key (sk-ant-admin...). Falls back to ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY. Note: the WIF endpoints (service accounts, federation issuers/rules) reject admin API keys and require an org:admin OAuth token.
- `base_url` (String) API base URL. Falls back to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, then https://api.anthropic.com.
- `federation` (Block, Optional) Mint the org:admin bearer token at plan time via Workload Identity Federation (POST /v1/oauth/token) instead of supplying a static credential. Requires a Console-created bootstrap rule with oauth_scope org:admin. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--federation))
- `oauth_token` (String, Sensitive) OAuth bearer token with the org:admin scope. Falls back to ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_TOKEN. Grants the full Admin API surface including WIF endpoints.

<a id="nestedblock--federation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `federation`

Optional:

- `federation_rule_id` (String) Federation rule ID (fdrl_...).
- `identity_token` (String, Sensitive) The OIDC JWT from your identity provider, as a literal string.
- `identity_token_file` (String) Filesystem path to the OIDC JWT (e.g. a projected service account token).
- `organization_id` (String) Anthropic organization UUID.
- `service_account_id` (String) Target service account ID (svac_...).
- `workspace_id` (String) Workspace to scope the token to (wrkspc_... or "default"). Required only when the rule spans multiple workspaces.
